subject: Databases
title: ORDER BY Sorts Results
description: One-minute skill: ORDER BY Sorts Results.

hook.text: Query results come back in no guaranteed order. ORDER BY gives you control.

buildup.text: ORDER BY name ASC sorts alphabetically. ORDER BY created_at DESC puts newest first.

discovery.text: You can sort by multiple columns: ORDER BY country, name. First by country, then by name within each.

twist.text: Sorting a million rows in memory is expensive. An index on the sorted column avoids the work.

climax.text: Combine ORDER BY with LIMIT to get the top N results. Leaderboards, newest posts, biggest orders.

punchline.text: ORDER BY controls the sequence. LIMIT caps the count.

quiz.question: Why is ORDER BY on a non-indexed column expensive?
options: The database must sort all matching rows in memory before returning them
It requires a separate sorting server
Non-indexed columns cannot be sorted at all
